function.name: execute_remediation
function.description: Adjusts physical printer parameters dynamically based on visual defect detection and geometric analysis.

defect_type.description: The exact classification of the visual anomaly.

target_temperature_celsius.description: If under_extrusion is detected, increase current temp by 5 to 10 degrees. Absolute maximum is 240.

speed_percentage.description: If layer_shift is detected, reduce the kinematic speed to 70% to stabilize the motors.
